pos.label: POS Terminal
pos.changelog: Assign waiter shown on KOT & bill, improved receipt layout, paper size bug fix, no duplicate bill print on settlement

captain.label: Captain App
captain.changelog: Direct WiFi printing — bill and KOT print straight to printer, no POS machine needed

kds.label: Kitchen Display
kds.changelog: Coloured source stripe, table-first card header, highlighted item notes, large-screen support for Android TV and 21-50" monitors

ownerWeb.label: Owner Dashboard
ownerWeb.changelog: App Store download page, update notifications

tabletPos.label: Tablet POS
tabletPos.changelog: Full POS on Android tablet — orders, payments, GST bills, shifts, WiFi printing
